steps.t: Gadda stands with you in the Mead Hall of Stangard. You should speak with Gadda.
Stanric is in the Mead Hall. You should speak with Stanric about what you saw in Stangard.
Sithric is in the Mead Hall of Stangard.
Sithric is in the Mead Hall at Stangard.
Stanric is in the Mead Hall at Stangard.
